[{"id":"f036768cb7000010388487c2de11a993","transformType":null,"transformDefinition":null,"order":0,"parameters":[{"id":null,"name":"date_format","label":"Input Date Format","order":0,"attributes":{},"value":"NULL_OVERRIDE","type":"choice","defaultValue":null,"typeLabel":null,"mandatory":true,"choices":[{"label":"-- None --","value":"","order":1},{"label":"Custom (enter below)","value":"NULL_OVERRIDE","order":2},{"label":"ISO Date (2004-06-28)","value":"yyyy-MM-dd","order":3},{"label":"ISO Date/Time (2004-06-28T17:34:10Z)","value":"yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'","order":4},{"label":"ServiceNow Date/Time (2004-06-28 17:34:10)","value":"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss","order":5},{"label":"EEE, MMM dd, yyyy (Mon, Jun 28, 2004)","value":"EEE, MMM dd, yyyy","order":6},{"label":"EEE, MMM dd, yyyy h:mm a (Mon, Jun 28, 2004 5:34 PM)","value":"EEE, MMM dd, yyyy h:mm a","order":7},{"label":"MM-dd-yyyy (06-28-2004)","value":"MM-dd-yyyy","order":8},{"label":"MM-dd-yyyy h:mm a (06-28-2004 5:34 PM)","value":"MM-dd-yyyy h:mm a","order":9},{"label":"MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm:ss (06-28-2004 17:34:10)","value":"MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm:ss","order":10},{"label":"MM/dd/yyyy (06/28/2004)","value":"MM/dd/yyyy","order":11},{"label":"MM/dd/yyyy h:mm a (06/28/2004 5:34 PM)","value":"MM/dd/yyyy h:mm a","order":12},{"label":"MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss (06/28/2004 15:34:10)","value":"MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss","order":13},{"label":"MMM dd, yyyy (Jun 28, 2004)","value":"MMM dd, yyyy","order":14},{"label":"MMM dd, yyyy h:mm a (Jun 28, 2004 5:34 PM)","value":"MMM dd, yyyy h:mm a","order":15},{"label":"yyyy-MM-dd h:mm a (2004-06-28 5:34 PM)","value":"yyyy-MM-dd h:mm a","order":16},{"label":"yyyy/MM/dd (2004/06/28)","value":"yyyy/MM/dd","order":17},{"label":"yyyy/MM/dd h:mm a (2004/06/28 5:34 PM)","value":"yyyy/MM/dd h:mm a","order":18},{"label":"yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss (2004/06/28 17:34:10)","value":"yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss","order":19}]},{"id":null,"name":"custom_format","label":"Custom Format","order":1,"attributes":{},"value":"dd MMM yyyy","type":"string","defaultValue":"","typeLabel":null,"mandatory":false,"choices":[]}]}]

[{"id":"f036768cb7000010388487c2de11a993","transformType":null,"transformDefinition":null,"order":0,"parameters":[{"id":null,"name":"date_format","label":"Input Date Format","order":0,"attributes":{},"value":"NULL_OVERRIDE","type":"choice","defaultValue":null,"typeLabel":null,"mandatory":true,"choices":[{"label":"-- None --","value":"","order":1},{"label":"Custom (enter below)","value":"NULL_OVERRIDE","order":2},{"label":"ISO Date (2004-06-28)","value":"yyyy-MM-dd","order":3},{"label":"ISO Date/Time (2004-06-28T17:34:10Z)","value":"yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'","order":4},{"label":"ServiceNow Date/Time (2004-06-28 17:34:10)","value":"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss","order":5},{"label":"EEE, MMM dd, yyyy (Mon, Jun 28, 2004)","value":"EEE, MMM dd, yyyy","order":6},{"label":"EEE, MMM dd, yyyy h:mm a (Mon, Jun 28, 2004 5:34 PM)","value":"EEE, MMM dd, yyyy h:mm a","order":7},{"label":"MM-dd-yyyy (06-28-2004)","value":"MM-dd-yyyy","order":8},{"label":"MM-dd-yyyy h:mm a (06-28-2004 5:34 PM)","value":"MM-dd-yyyy h:mm a","order":9},{"label":"MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm:ss (06-28-2004 17:34:10)","value":"MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm:ss","order":10},{"label":"MM/dd/yyyy (06/28/2004)","value":"MM/dd/yyyy","order":11},{"label":"MM/dd/yyyy h:mm a (06/28/2004 5:34 PM)","value":"MM/dd/yyyy h:mm a","order":12},{"label":"MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss (06/28/2004 15:34:10)","value":"MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss","order":13},{"label":"MMM dd, yyyy (Jun 28, 2004)","value":"MMM dd, yyyy","order":14},{"label":"MMM dd, yyyy h:mm a (Jun 28, 2004 5:34 PM)","value":"MMM dd, yyyy h:mm a","order":15},{"label":"yyyy-MM-dd h:mm a (2004-06-28 5:34 PM)","value":"yyyy-MM-dd h:mm a","order":16},{"label":"yyyy/MM/dd (2004/06/28)","value":"yyyy/MM/dd","order":17},{"label":"yyyy/MM/dd h:mm a (2004/06/28 5:34 PM)","value":"yyyy/MM/dd h:mm a","order":18},{"label":"yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss (2004/06/28 17:34:10)","value":"yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss","order":19}]},{"id":null,"name":"custom_format","label":"Custom Format","order":1,"attributes":{},"value":"dd MMM yyyy","type":"string","defaultValue":"","typeLabel":null,"mandatory":false,"choices":[]}]}]
